options.text: Appreciate the feedback—I’ll keep you posted.
Can you send me the report again?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Appreciate the feedback—I’ll keep you posted.' 既表达了感谢，又承诺了后续跟进，符合职场礼貌结束对话的规范。'No problem' 虽然常见，但过于随意，缺乏主动承诺；'I guess so' 回应模糊，不恰当；'Can you send me the report again?' 是请求而非回应，偏离语境。
content.speakerText: Thanks for the update—looks like you’re on track.

options.text: Thanks for saying that—I’m glad I could help.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for saying that—I’m glad I could help.' 礼貌回应了对方的感谢，并表达了乐意提供帮助的态度，符合职场道别场景的双向礼貌原则。'Sure thing, see you tomorrow.' 虽然友好，但未回应感谢；'Yeah, it was easy.' 显得轻率，缺乏专业性；'What’s next...' 转移话题，忽略情感回应。
content.speakerText: I really appreciate all your support on this project.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你对这个项目的大力支持。
